author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو عبد الله محمد بن عبد الله بن مالك الأندلسي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: One of the most influential grammarians in Islamic history, known for his comprehensive works in Arabic grammar and morphology.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A foundational text in the study of Arabic grammar and morphology, widely used as a teaching tool.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: The Alfiyyah is one of the most famous and widely studied texts in Arabic grammar, known for its concise and comprehensive coverage of the subject.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Dr. Abdul Muhsin bin Muhammad Al-Qasim is a respected scholar and imam of the Prophet's Mosque in Madinah, known for his meticulous work in textual verification.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The edition is based on multiple manuscripts, including one read to the author's student and bearing his handwriting and authorization, as well as copies by Ibn Hisham and others.
